advisories.rationale: Composes a new multi-section transcript and registry entry; downstream phases depend on the initial shape.
Registry write that captures at-join identity; bounded helper call.
Contribution must integrate with prior speakers and the active-phase contract.
Convergent gate reviewer pass; one bad judgment propagates across the verdict.
Tombstones the current role's latest active-phase contribution; bounded transcript edit.
Replaces the visible contribution while preserving audit history.
Phase transition gated by the registry; helper enforces preconditions.
Restores an archived collab from registry state.
Scoped metadata edit on the resolved collab.
Clears scoped metadata on the resolved collab.
Renders registry state as a list.
Switches the active collab pointer in the registry.
Opens a new collab from existing record state.
Reopen rationale must be preserved and justified; the lifecycle decision affects downstream cap-exit actions.
Closes a completed collab and emits the close summary.
Removes a participant from the registry roster.
Soft-deletes the collab from the active set.
Permanently removes the collab record and registry entry.
Synthesizes the completion narrative from transcript state.
Replaces the existing summary while preserving its outline.
Implements role-assigned action-plan items in source; scoped validation gates the execution record.
Records issue-terminal handoff evidence and may close the collab without reviewer seal state.
Rewrites the last execution record in place; preserves historical metadata.
Per-participant verification judgment; convergent gate before reviewer seal.
Renders the resolved gate policy for the active collab.
Renders the generated flag inventory.
Renders verdict metadata from registry state.
Reviewer seal pass; one bad judgment stales the seal and blocks close.
Reads the append-only revision store and emits the registry changelog.
Reads registry state and displays the current workflow state of the resolved collab.
Compares registry-derived content state against the content-only transcript sections.
